  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' places the core responsibility on sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing may involve interpretive choices, so any residual ambiguity or assumptions introduced by wording changes should be transparently signaled.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid strengthening claims (e.g., implying causality or greater certainty) beyond what the original text supports.",
    "RX.3": "Scope must remain limited to stylistic and readability improvements rather than conceptual, methodological, or structural changes.",
    "RX.4": "Wording changes should not inadvertently introduce misleading interpretations about climate–agriculture relationships that could cause downstream misuse.",
    "RX.5": "Revisions should preserve original meaning and maintain clear linkage to the source text to ensure traceability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' places the core responsibility on sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing may involve interpretive choices, so any residual ambiguity or assumptions introduced by wording changes should be transparently signaled.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid strengthening claims (e.g., implying causality or greater certainty) beyond what the original text supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope must remain limited to stylistic and readability improvements rather than conceptual, methodological, or structural changes.
rationale.RX.4: Wording changes should not inadvertently introduce misleading interpretations about climate–agriculture relationships that could cause downstream misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Revisions should preserve original meaning and maintain clear linkage to the source text to ensure traceability.
